name: STANDARDS-URLS registry: merged entry from operator YAML gets origin:operator and added_by:operator (per §2.6 plugin-internal fields auto-filled)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: op-source
  name: Op
  url: https://op.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [x]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/sources.yaml" --operator "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" --emit "$PWD/merged.yaml" && grep -E "id: op-source" merged.yaml -A 20 | grep "origin: operator" 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
